name: Lazada platform qualification pack
change_note: Migrated from script PLATFORM_HINTS into a composable platform pack.
checklist_hints: Check regional marketplace eligibility, restricted products, brand authorization, and category documents.

requirements.requirement: Verify current Lazada country-site seller eligibility, restricted products, brand authorization, and category document requirements.
requirements.decision_effect: Cannot approve Lazada cases until country-site route and category requirements are verified.
requirements.notes: SEA country-site rules and local-language requirements can differ.

sources.title: Lazada Seller Center
sources.confirms: Lazada Seller Center is the official seller operations and policy entry point for Lazada marketplace sellers.

sources.title: Lazada: Marketplace Seller Terms and Conditions
sources.confirms: Lazada terms require sellers and users to comply with platform rules, applicable law, and marketplace obligations.

sources.title: Lazada Seller Center: Prohibited and Controlled Products Policy
sources.confirms: Lazada country-site policies can restrict prohibited and controlled products and require category-specific review.

sources.title: Lazada: Intellectual Property Rights Policy
sources.confirms: Lazada intellectual property policy supports brand/IP authorization and infringement review.

gaps: Seed pack: verify current official Lazada policy pages per case before final decisions.
